title: The ‘Yellow Line’ Security Strategy
description: Source: IE Subject: Mapping Context: The Israeli government has officially expanded the Yellow Line strategy from the Gaza Strip to southern Lebanon, establishing a militarized buffer zone that extends up to the Litani River.
